evaluation.notes: Provisional internal product-quality baseline evaluated against the frozen prompt and protocol using repository evidence. Historical build duration is not comparable with external generation time and is therefore excluded from the score.

core-study-flow.notes: Participant consent, study, completion, and full-stack persistence are automated.

evidence.claim: Browser coverage for the complete participant journey.
Real frontend, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL flow runs in CI.

state-recovery.notes: Participant and supervisor flows recover after refresh.

evidence.claim: Participant recovery after refresh is tested.
Supervisor question recovery after refresh is tested.

failure-handling.notes: API and study-loading failures have explicit recoverable states.

evidence.claim: Participant creation, scenario loading, and response failure paths are tested.
Backend services and API behavior are covered by Pytest.

visual-hierarchy.notes: Shared branding and structured participant, supervisor, and analysis pages are implemented; no independent visual audit exists.

evidence.claim: Shared branded header across application experiences.
Structured presentation dashboard styling.

responsive-layout.notes: Responsive breakpoints are implemented and manually reviewed; automated multi-viewport visual regression is not present.

evidence.claim: Responsive layouts at tablet and mobile breakpoints.
Responsive supervisor workspace styling.

keyboard-semantics.notes: Semantic buttons, links, labels, headings, and progress roles are used, but no complete keyboard audit is recorded.

evidence.claim: Questions use labeled controls and semantic actions.
Charts expose progressbar roles and accessible labels.

automated-accessibility.notes: No axe, Lighthouse accessibility, or equivalent automated gate is currently enforced.

dependency-code-scanning.notes: Dependency review, CodeQL, and update automation are configured.

evidence.claim: Security workflow validates source and dependencies.
Automated dependency updates are configured.

secrets-boundaries.notes: Secrets and private environment files are excluded, validated, and scanned.

evidence.claim: Repository audit checks generated artifacts and secret-bearing files.
Environment files, credentials, keys, and secrets are excluded.

unit-integration-coverage.notes: Frontend and backend test suites enforce coverage thresholds.

evidence.claim: Frontend unit tests, coverage, build, and lint run in CI.
Backend Pytest coverage, migrations, and lint run in CI.

browser-full-stack.notes: Mocked browser tests and real-stack browser tests are automated.

evidence.claim: Mocked Playwright journeys run in CI.
Playwright runs against FastAPI and PostgreSQL.

research-presentation-separation.notes: Supervisor interactions and presentation analytics are isolated from participant research results.

evidence.claim: Supervisor questions and comparative analysis generate no research API traffic.
The isolation contract is explicit and testable.

persistence-boundaries.notes: Research persistence uses explicit API/database boundaries while supervisor state stays in sessionStorage.

evidence.claim: Full-stack persisted responses are verified directly in PostgreSQL.
Supervisor state is scoped to sessionStorage.

containerized-release.notes: Backend and frontend release images and Docker Compose topology are defined.

evidence.claim: Release topology includes PostgreSQL, migrations, seeding, backend, and frontend.
Backend release image is defined.
Frontend Nginx release image is defined.

health-migrations-smoke.notes: Migrations, service health, seeding, and release smoke testing are automated.

evidence.claim: Release images and smoke tests run in CI.
A real session with persisted responses is verified through the public frontend.

architecture-types.notes: Typed frontend modules and layered backend services are present; no independent maintainability audit exists.

evidence.claim: React and TypeScript modules separate pages, API clients, study state, and supervisor state.
FastAPI layers separate API, repositories, services, and persistence.

documentation-ci.notes: Setup, validation, release, and readiness procedures are documented and enforced.

evidence.claim: Local setup and validation commands are documented.
Repository readiness is checked deterministically.
Release, smoke, publication, and rollback procedures are documented.

supervisor-flow.notes: A protected supervisor journey includes local questions, review, and comparative presentation.

evidence.claim: Supervisor initialization, completion, refresh, reset, and analysis are tested.
Customer-facing supervisor experience is implemented.

comparison-clarity.notes: Presentation values are clearly labeled as illustrative; real cross-tool benchmark evidence is not yet complete.

evidence.claim: The dashboard labels illustrative values and research-write boundaries.
Presentation labeling and no-live-data behavior are tested.
